name: antigravity-hub
description: A premium, local-only AI quota and usage tracker for Antigravity with intelligent grouping and customizable status bar.
author: 0libote

antigravityHub.pollInterval.description: Interval (ms) to poll local AntiGravity usage API.

antigravityHub.statusBarFormat.description: Style of the status bar item.

antigravityHub.warningThreshold.description: Percentage threshold below which models show a yellow warning.

antigravityHub.criticalThreshold.description: Percentage threshold below which models show a red danger alert.

antigravityHub.visibleGroups.description: List of group IDs to display as pills in the status bar.

antigravityHub.dashboardDisplayStyle.description: Visual style for displaying quota in the dashboard.

antigravityHub.notificationsEnabled.description: Show desktop notifications when quota reaches critical thresholds.

antigravityHub.groupingEnabled.description: Show grouped cards vs individual model cards in the dashboard.
